node.description: Done means the repository has a Rust workspace foundation aligned with the committed documentation, including package naming, core model crates, an in-memory structural path, and a minimal Architecture Product smoke scenario ready for verification.
node.title: Implement the HigherGraphen MVP foundation

node.description: Create Cargo workspace and the initial HigherGraphen MVP crates. Acceptance requires compilable crates for core, space, morphism, invariant, obstruction, completion, projection, and interpretation with shared dependency policy.
node.title: Scaffold Rust workspace and core crates

node.description: Confirm and document the naming contract for Rust crates, workspace paths, import paths, npm packages, Python bindings, intermediate tools, and agent-facing plugin names before scaffolding implementation.
node.title: Lock package and tool naming contract

node.description: Implement or encode the Order Service to Billing DB scenario so invariant checking produces an obstruction and a reviewable completion candidate, then record the verification evidence.
node.title: Prove Architecture Product smoke scenario

node.description: Baseline docs are committed in f58f9e6 and d44eee0. They define the official English documentation set, intermediate tools map, AI agent integration strategy, MVP roadmap, Rust-first ADR, package boundaries, core concepts, and Architecture Product reference scenario. The case starts from a clean working tree before .casegraphen creation.
node.title: Documentation baseline committed

changes.description: Create the Cargo workspace and compilable MVP crate shells only. Acceptance requires root Cargo.toml, crate directories for core, space, morphism, invariant, obstruction, completion, projection, and interpretation, shared dependency policy, and a workspace-level cargo check passing before package-specific behavior starts.

node.description: Implement shared IDs, source references, provenance, confidence, severity, review status, error primitives, and serialization contracts. Depends on workspace scaffold. Proof before done: package compiles and core model tests cover serde roundtrips and basic enum/value behavior.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-core package

node.description: Run and record the smallest proof that core is reusable by downstream crates. Acceptance requires targeted tests or cargo test for higher-graphen-core, cargo check for the package, and evidence describing any exposed contracts downstream packages rely on.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-core package

node.description: Implement Space, Cell, Incidence, Complex, basic query types, and in-memory structural store boundaries using core primitives. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover cell insertion, incidence insertion, complex construction, and basic query behavior.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-space package

node.description: Verify that the space package works as the substrate for later packages. Acceptance requires targeted tests or cargo test for higher-graphen-space, cargo check for downstream compile compatibility, and evidence for the store/query contracts.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-space package

node.description: Implement Morphism, MorphismType, LostStructure, Distortion, composition boundaries, and preservation report types. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover identity-like mapping assumptions, composition failure/success, and lost-structure serialization.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-morphism package

node.description: Verify morphism behavior and preservation reporting as a reusable package. Acceptance requires targeted morphism tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence describing preserved, violated, lost, and distorted structure semantics.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-morphism package

node.description: Implement Invariant, Constraint, check input/result types, severity-scoped checks, and minimal predicate/check engine boundaries. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover invariant representation, constraint violation shape, and changed-cell scoped check inputs.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-invariant package

node.description: Verify invariant and constraint checks independently from product logic. Acceptance requires targeted invariant tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence that violations can be represented without product-specific assumptions.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-invariant package

node.description: Implement Obstruction, ObstructionType, Counterexample, explanation boundaries, and conversion from invariant/constraint failures. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover counterexample payloads, location cells/contexts, related morphisms, and required resolution fields.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-obstruction package

node.description: Verify obstruction objects are structured failures, not untyped error strings. Acceptance requires targeted obstruction tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence that invariant violations can be projected into obstruction data.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-obstruction package

node.description: Implement CompletionCandidate, MissingType, review status flow, accept/reject result types, and minimal completion engine boundaries. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover candidate creation, accepted completion shape, rejection reason handling, and non-promotion of unreviewed candidates.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-completion package

node.description: Verify completion remains reviewable and does not silently become accepted structure. Acceptance requires targeted completion tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence for accept/reject workflow behavior.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-completion package

node.description: Implement Projection, ProjectionSelector, ProjectionResult, audience, purpose, output schema, and information-loss reporting. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover selector matching, projection metadata, source traceability, and declared information loss.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-projection package

node.description: Verify projections are traceable views rather than lossy summaries without disclosure. Acceptance requires targeted projection tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence that information loss and source IDs are present in outputs.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-projection package

node.description: Implement InterpretationPackage, cell/morphism type mappings, invariant templates, projection templates, and lift adapter definitions. Proof before done: package compiles and tests cover mapping lookup, template registration, and Architecture Product interpretation metadata.
node.title: Implement higher-graphen-interpretation package

node.description: Verify interpretation packages can give domain meaning to core structure without leaking product assumptions into core crates. Acceptance requires targeted interpretation tests, cargo check for the package, and evidence for Architecture Product mapping templates.
node.title: Verify higher-graphen-interpretation package

node.description: Run the cross-package verification after every MVP package verification passes. Acceptance requires workspace-level cargo check or test, dependency direction sanity check, and evidence that package boundaries match docs/specs/package-boundaries.md and docs/specs/intermediate-tools-map.md.
node.title: Verify workspace integration across MVP packages

node.description: The initial coarse implementation graph was refined after review. Each MVP package now has separate implementation and verification tasks. The scaffold task is limited to workspace and crate shell creation, package verification tasks feed workspace integration verification, and the Architecture Product smoke scenario depends on workspace integration.
node.title: Package-level implementation and verification tasks added

node.description: Define the pre-implementation static analysis policy before package code grows. Acceptance requires documented thresholds and commands for rustfmt, clippy warnings, function/file size, cognitive complexity, dependency direction, and the rule that implementation tasks cannot complete unless their package-specific checks pass.
node.title: Define static analysis and complexity policy

node.description: Add the repo-level static analysis configuration after the workspace scaffold and before package implementation. Acceptance requires a runnable command or script that performs formatting check, clippy with denied warnings, size/complexity checks, and any crate-boundary checks needed to keep packages small and maintainable.
node.title: Configure workspace static analysis gate

node.description: Run static analysis after package implementation and verification, then refactor any functions, files, modules, or dependency edges that violate the policy. Acceptance requires recorded analysis output, fixes for violations or explicit documented exceptions, and a clean final static-analysis run before workspace integration.
node.title: Run static analysis and refactor MVP packages

node.description: Decision point for which MVP packages may be implemented in parallel after core and static analysis gates are ready. Expected result: core is the hard prerequisite; space is the substrate; several packages can then proceed in parallel behind explicit dependency edges.
node.title: Package implementation parallelization strategy

changes.description: Decision point for package implementation parallelization. Preferred strategy: implement and verify higher-graphen-core first; configure static analysis before implementation; then implement non-core MVP packages in parallel when they depend only on core IDs/DTO contracts. If a package introduces concrete dependencies on another package, add explicit depends_on edges before work starts.

node.description: The case now requires static analysis policy before implementation, a configured static-analysis gate before package implementation, and a post-implementation static-analysis/refactor pass before workspace integration. Non-core packages are modeled as parallelizable after core verification, static gate setup, and the package parallelization decision, assuming APIs stay behind core IDs/DTO contracts.
node.title: Static analysis and package parallelization requirements recorded

node.description: Design the higher-graphen-core contract before writing package code. Acceptance requires a documented contract for Id, SourceRef, Provenance, Confidence, Severity, ReviewStatus, error policy, serde boundary, feature flags if any, and which downstream crates may depend on which core primitives. This task should explicitly prevent core from absorbing domain-specific concepts.
node.title: Design core contracts before implementation

node.description: Create package-level implementation notes for space, morphism, invariant, obstruction, completion, projection, and interpretation after the core contract is stable. Acceptance requires each package to have inputs, outputs, core dependencies, forbidden dependencies, smallest verification command, and split criteria if the package grows too large.
node.title: Detail non-core package workplans for parallel implementation

changes.description: Implement shared IDs, source references, provenance, confidence, severity, review status, error primitives, and serialization contracts from task_design_core_contracts. Depends on workspace scaffold and static-analysis gate. Proof before done: package compiles and core model tests cover serde roundtrips, basic enum/value behavior, and downstream contract assumptions.

Verify core as the stable prerequisite for parallel downstream package work. Acceptance requires targeted tests or cargo test for higher-graphen-core, cargo check for the package, and evidence describing the frozen contracts downstream packages rely on.

node.description: The implementation graph now requires explicit core contract design before core implementation. Non-core package workplans are created only after core verification, then the parallelization decision can release non-core package implementation in parallel where dependencies remain behind core primitives and documented package boundaries.
node.title: Core-first parallelization refinement recorded

node.description: Locked package and tool naming in docs/specs/package-boundaries.md and docs/specs/ai-agent-integration.md. The contract now covers Rust Cargo package names, crate import names, workspace paths, npm scope, Python distribution and import paths, intermediate tool names, tool package paths, skill names, plugin bundle names, marketplace display names, CLI command family, and MCP server naming. Verification passed with git diff --check and cg validate --case hg_impl_foundation --format json.
node.title: Naming contract documented and verified

node.description: Added docs/specs/static-analysis-policy.md and linked it from docs/index.md and docs/source-trace.md. The policy defines rustfmt, cargo check, clippy with denied warnings, test, size, local complexity, dependency direction, package-specific verification, and completion rules for implementation tasks. Verification passed with git diff --check and cg validate --case hg_impl_foundation --format json.
node.title: Static analysis policy defined

node.description: Created the root Cargo workspace and MVP crate shells for higher-graphen-core, space, morphism, invariant, obstruction, completion, projection, and interpretation. Added .gitignore for target/. Verification passed with cargo fmt --all --check, cargo check --workspace, git diff --check, and cg validate --case hg_impl_foundation --format json.
node.title: Rust workspace scaffold verified

node.description: Added docs/specs/core-contracts.md and linked it from docs/index.md and docs/source-trace.md. The contract covers Id, SourceRef, Provenance, Confidence, Severity, ReviewStatus, structured errors, serde serialization boundaries, feature-flag policy, downstream dependency rules, and the boundary that core must not absorb domain-specific concepts. Verification passed with git diff --check.
node.title: Core contracts documented

node.description: Added scripts/static-analysis.sh and scripts/check-static-limits.py. The gate runs cargo fmt --all --check, cargo check --workspace, cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings, Rust file/function size checks, decision-point checks, and HigherGraphen crate dependency-direction checks. Verification passed with sh scripts/static-analysis.sh and git diff --check.
node.title: Workspace static analysis gate configured

node.description: Implemented Id, SourceKind, SourceRef, Confidence, Severity, ReviewStatus, Provenance, CoreError, and the Result alias in higher-graphen-core. Core uses serde for stable primitive serialization and serde_json only in tests. Verification passed with cargo fmt --all --check, cargo test -p higher-graphen-core, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cg validate --case hg_impl_foundation --format json. Initial sandbox cargo test failed because crates.io DNS was blocked; the approved rerun fetched dependencies and passed.
node.title: higher-graphen-core primitives implemented

node.description: Independent verification confirmed higher-graphen-core satisfies the frozen downstream contract. The crate exports only Id, SourceKind, SourceRef, Confidence, Severity, ReviewStatus, Provenance, CoreError, and Result; uses serde as the only normal dependency and serde_json only for tests; and has no downstream, provider, tool, or UI dependencies. Verification passed with cargo check -p higher-graphen-core, cargo test -p higher-graphen-core, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, and git diff --check.
node.title: higher-graphen-core contract verified

node.description: Added docs/specs/non-core-package-workplans.md and linked it from docs/index.md and docs/source-trace.md. The document defines purpose, inputs, outputs, core dependencies, forbidden dependencies, smallest verification command, and split criteria for space, morphism, invariant, obstruction, completion, projection, and interpretation packages. Verification passed with git diff --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, and cg validate --case hg_impl_foundation --format json.
node.title: Non-core package workplans detailed

metadata.decision_result: Proceed with parallel non-core MVP implementation after verified core. Packages may be implemented concurrently when they depend only on higher-graphen-core and already-earlier package contracts from docs/specs/non-core-package-workplans.md. Dependency direction remains enforced by scripts/static-analysis.sh; concrete downstream or cyclic dependencies require new case edges before work starts.

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-space MVP with Space, Cell, Incidence, Complex, Dimension, IncidenceOrientation, ComplexType, CellQuery, and InMemorySpaceStore. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-space --lib, cargo clippy -p higher-graphen-space --all-targets -- -D warnings, cargo fmt --all --check, git diff --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh after parallel package formatting settled, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-space MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-morphism MVP with Morphism, MorphismType, CellMapping, RelationMapping, LostStructure, Distortion, PreservationReport, CompositionResult, and explicit composition logic. Composition succeeds only when target/source spaces are compatible and does not infer unmatched intermediate mappings. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-morphism --lib, cargo fmt --all --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-morphism MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-invariant MVP with Invariant, Constraint, InvariantScope, ConstraintScope, CheckInput, CheckStatus, CheckResult, Violation, and CheckTargetKind. CheckInput supports changed-cell scoped checks, and CheckResult has satisfied, violated, and unsupported helpers without introducing obstruction types. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-invariant --lib, cargo fmt --all --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-invariant MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-obstruction MVP with Obstruction, ObstructionType, Counterexample, RelatedMorphism, ObstructionExplanation, and RequiredResolution. It records location cells, location contexts, related morphisms, severity, provenance, optional counterexamples, and required resolution without projection-specific rendering. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-obstruction --lib, cargo fmt --all --check after formatting, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-obstruction MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-completion MVP with CompletionCandidate, MissingType, SuggestedStructure, AcceptedCompletion, RejectedCompletion, accept_completion, and reject_completion helpers. Acceptance and rejection require explicit reviewer IDs and reasons and return separate records so unreviewed candidates are not silently promoted. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-completion --lib, cargo check/clippy for the package, cargo fmt --all --check after formatting, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-completion MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-projection MVP with Projection, ProjectionSelector, ProjectionResult, ProjectionAudience, ProjectionPurpose, OutputSchema, InformationLoss, RendererKind, and transport-neutral output helpers. Source IDs and declared information loss remain explicit. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-projection --lib, cargo fmt --all --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-projection MVP implemented

node.description: Implemented the higher-graphen-interpretation MVP with InterpretationPackage, TypeMapping, MorphismTypeMapping, InvariantTemplate, ProjectionTemplate, LiftAdapterDefinition, and registration/lookup helpers. Architecture Product identity is represented as generic string metadata rather than a product dependency. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-interpretation --lib, cargo fmt --all --check, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-interpretation MVP implemented

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-space as the structural substrate. Public API covers Space, Cell, Incidence, Complex, CellQuery, and InMemorySpaceStore; dependencies remain product-neutral and limited to higher-graphen-core and serde. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-space --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-space verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-morphism as a reusable transformation package. It covers morphisms, explicit composition, preservation reports, lost structure, and distortion; compatibility is checked explicitly and product-neutral dependencies remain limited to higher-graphen-core and serde. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-morphism --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-morphism verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-invariant independently from product logic. It covers invariants, constraints, check inputs/results, violation summaries, and unsupported status without returning obstruction types or creating an invariant-obstruction cycle. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-invariant --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-invariant verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-obstruction as structured failure data rather than untyped error strings. It covers obstruction records, explanations, counterexamples, related morphisms, severity, and resolution hints while remaining projection-neutral and product-neutral. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-obstruction --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-obstruction verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-completion review safety and rule/detection boundary. CompletionCandidate defaults to Unreviewed; accept/reject produce separate explicit review records; CompletionRule, CompletionDetectionInput, CompletionDetectionResult, SimpleCompletionEngine, and detect_completion_candidates materialize explicit rule proposals as unreviewed candidates. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-completion --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-completion verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-projection traceability and loss disclosure. The public API requires declared InformationLoss and explicit source_ids on projection results, sections, and entries, while remaining UI/API transport neutral. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-projection --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-projection verified

node.description: Verified higher-graphen-interpretation as a product-independent domain-meaning layer. It exposes domain-neutral mappings, templates, and lift adapter definitions; Architecture Product identity is represented as generic metadata; dependencies remain limited to higher-graphen-core and serde. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-interpretation --lib, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, git diff --check, and cargo test --workspace.
node.title: higher-graphen-interpretation verified

node.description: Ran the post-implementation static-analysis/refactor pass. No further refactor was required after package implementation and completion follow-up. Verification passed with sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, cargo test --workspace, and git diff --check. The static gate includes rustfmt, cargo check, clippy with denied warnings, hard file/function/decision limits, and HigherGraphen crate dependency-direction checks.
node.title: Static analysis refactor pass clean

node.description: Verified cross-package MVP workspace integration. cargo test --workspace passed with 45 unit tests and doc-tests clean. sh scripts/static-analysis.sh passed, including rustfmt check, workspace check, clippy with -D warnings, size/complexity checks, and dependency-direction checks. git diff --check passed. Workspace members match the MVP package set in docs/specs/package-boundaries.md, dependency direction is sane, and intermediate *graphen tools remain separated from core crates as described in docs/specs/intermediate-tools-map.md.
node.title: Workspace integration verified

node.description: Added examples/architecture as a workspace example crate. The smoke test builds Order Service, Billing Service, and Billing DB cells/incidences; encodes the no cross-context direct DB access invariant; creates a violated CheckResult; represents it as an Obstruction; proposes a Billing Service billing status API CompletionCandidate; and asserts the candidate remains ReviewStatus::Unreviewed. Verification passed with cargo test -p higher-graphen-architecture-smoke order_service_to_billing_db_produces_obstruction_and_unreviewed_candidate, cargo test --workspace, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, and git diff --check.
node.title: Architecture smoke scenario verified
